blockers.description: Cannot finalize reconciliation until DOC-014 automated content audit baseline is implemented and available in CI.
blockers.resolution: DOC-014 automated content audit (tools/scripts/content-audit.ts) is implemented and passing (211 routes, 0 drift). Reconciliation finalized against it as the single source of truth.

notes: Closes Issue #019 / R-023 (Docs Integrity) execution gap by reconciling conflicting route totals across design docs using apps/web/src/app/**/page.tsx as source of truth (canonical 211, emitted by tools/scripts/content-audit.ts). Tabela .txt quality criteria (clarity, consistency, completeness, update cadence) applied as acceptance constraints. Original KPI target 119 predates app growth since 2026-03-04; canonical is now 211 and all 7 docs agree. A route-total-consistency test (15/15) guards against future drift. CSV Status flip deferred to a follow-up PR.

validations.name: content-audit
validations.detail: Routes found: 211; Ghost links: 0; no drift detected.

validations.name: prettier
validations.detail: All matched files use Prettier code style!

validations.name: pre-ship
validations.detail: Full gate mirrors CI required checks (format/lint/typecheck/unit/integration/coverage/build/security); commit lands only on green.
